# StockAI

> AI-powered stock prediction and trading-signal platform. Scans 6,000+ tickers in real time, generates calibrated buy/sell signals, and lets users backtest strategies and track paper-trading portfolios.

StockAI is a research and paper-trading platform — not financial advice. It combines a quantitative signal engine (10+ technical indicators, regime detection, isotonic-calibrated conviction scores) with an institutional-grade backtester (Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, Monte Carlo, walk-forward analysis).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, live signal counts, and feature summary.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Live AI trading signals, market scanner output, virtual portfolio P&L.
- [Backtest](/backtest): Strategy backtesting with Monte Carlo and walk-forward analysis.
- [Watchlist](/watchlist): User watchlist with AI-suggested tickers and price alerts.
- [Disclosure](/disclosure): Risk disclosure and paper-trading limitations.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Authentication page (account required).
